Lolo RSS Reader F-Droid Repo

Eigenes F-Droid-Repo fuer den RSS Reader mit signierten Updates.

Currently it serves 1 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://immerzu.github.io/lolo-rssreader-fdroid/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
E2 8D B1 9F 26 29 84 19 98 91 FE 7B B9 8D 80 83 09 BB 4F 05 1E 8A 7E F5 B4 4D 9D 30 E5 D4 72 ED
